transcript: Robot: ನಿಮ್ಮ SMILE ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿದೆ [Your smile is beautiful] Woman: Your smile is beautiful. Robot: ನನಗೆ ಚಹಾ ಇಷ್ಟ [I like tea] Woman: I like tea. Robot: ನೀವು ಎಲ್ಲಿಗೆ ಹೋಗುತ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ [Where are you going?] Woman: Where are you going? Robot: ನಾವು ಮತ್ತೆ ಭೇಟಿಯಾಗೋಣ [Let's meet again] Woman: Let's meet again. Robot: MySivi app ನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ practice ಮಾಡಿ. ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡುತ್ತಾ easy ಆಗಿ English ಕಲಿಯಿರಿ. [Practice with me like this on MySivi app. Learn English easily while speaking in Kannada.] Robot: Daily just 10-15 minutes ಸಾಕು, ನೀವು ಕೂಡ confident ಆಗಿ English ಮಾತನಾಡಬಹುದು. [Just 10-15 minutes daily is enough, you too can speak English confidently.] Robot: Speaking, Grammar, Sentence building... ಎಲ್ಲವೂ ಒಂದೇ place ನಲ್ಲಿ ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ. [Speaking, Grammar, Sentence building... everything in one place for just one rupee.] Robot: MySivi download ಮಾಡಿ, English ಕಲಿಯೋದು ಇಂದೇ start ಮಾಡಿ. [Download MySivi, start learning English today.]
on_screen_text: ನಿಮ್ಮ SMILE ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿದೆ [Your smile is beautiful] / ನನಗೆ ಚಹಾ ಇಷ್ಟ [I like tea] / ನೀವು ಎಲ್ಲಿಗೆ ಹೋಗುತ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ [Where are you going] / ನಾವು ಮತ್ತೆ ಭೇಟಿಯಾಗೋಣ [Let's meet again] / SPEAKING, GRAMMAR, SENTENCE BUILDING / MySivi Premium: 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1 / MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: An AI robot and a woman practice English translation from Kannada at a tea stall. The ad promotes the MySivi app, highlighting features like speaking, grammar, and sentence building for just ₹1 for 3 days of premium access. It encourages users to download the app and practice daily for 10-15 minutes.
